title: Implement ecosystem reconstruction works
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement ecosystem reconstruction works demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine scope of ecosystem reconstruction works

pcs.text: Determine boundaries between ecosystem reconstruction area and assisted regeneration area according to project brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine boundaries between ecosystem reconstruction area and assisted regeneration area according to project brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine boundaries between ecosystem reconstruction area and assisted regeneration area according to project brief.
